full_text:
Liu Jing
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Jing. Rear-guard in Dong Zhuo’s camapign against the Qiang. Proved an effective distraction. Liu Jing was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
